title: verbascum × dirupatae
intro: Verbascum × dirupatae, also known as Mullein, is a hybrid plant species in the figwort family, characterized by its tall, stately growth and clusters of yellow flowers. The plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits of Mullein include relief from respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Mullein can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
